headline: Lyft and United Launch First-Ever Pay With Miles Option for U.S. Rideshare
summary: SAN FRANCISCO & CHICAGO, April 29, 2026--Today, Lyft (Nasdaq: LYFT) and United Airlines (Nasdaq: UAL) announced the ability to pay with miles, a first-of-its-kind feature that allows MileagePlus® members to redeem miles directly in the Lyft app for eligible rides.* The launch marks the first time an airline loyalty program and rideshare platform have offered direct mile-to-ride redemption in the U.S. — giving travelers the flexibility to use their miles to cover their Lyft ride and flight.

content.title: Lyft and United Launch First-Ever Pay With Miles Option for U.S. Rideshare
content.summary: SAN FRANCISCO & CHICAGO, April 29, 2026--Today, Lyft (Nasdaq: LYFT) and United Airlines (Nasdaq: UAL) announced the ability to pay with miles, a first-of-its-kind feature that allows MileagePlus® members to redeem miles directly in the Lyft app for eligible rides.* The launch marks the first time an airline loyalty program and rideshare platform have offered direct mile-to-ride redemption in the U.S. — giving travelers the flexibility to use their miles to cover their Lyft ride and flight.
